/usr/bin/c++ CMakeFiles/endoscope.dir/endoscope_autogen/mocs_compilation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/endoscope.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/endoscope.dir/src/ui/mainwindow.cpp.o CMakeFiles/endoscope.dir/src/ui/presetmanager.cpp.o CMakeFiles/endoscope.dir/src/capture/filecapture.cpp.o CMakeFiles/endoscope.dir/src/processing/imageprocessor.cpp.o CMakeFiles/endoscope.dir/src/processing/neon_accel.cpp.o CMakeFiles/endoscope.dir/src/utils/imageconvert.cpp.o -o endoscope  /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt5Widgets.so.5.15.13 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libopencv_videoio.so.4.6.0 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libopencv_calib3d.so.4.6.0 -lpthread /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt5Gui.so.5.15.13 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt5Core.so.5.15.13 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libopencv_imgcodecs.so.4.6.0 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libopencv_features2d.so.4.6.0 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libopencv_imgproc.so.4.6.0 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libopencv_flann.so.4.6.0 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libopencv_core.so.4.6.0
